assertionResults.title: Window close cleans up pending OPS state

steps.action: Open app in isolated agent-browser session, seed runtime via DEV hooks on ws://127.0.0.1:8194, and dispatch ping operations to create in-flight pending_operations
steps.expected: Runtime has live relay connection and non-empty pending_operations prior to tab close
steps.observed: runtimeRelays showed ws://127.0.0.1:8194 online and pending_operations captured request_ids 4052f435994dbb3220f95de35a310dd9, 7609e8321c2f998523c7cd40910c7d99, 803a69eb6df0e8591610d19e0141ba1b, 8e6098471c4756aca5cad7667b6f8d82

steps.action: Navigate away (about:blank) to trigger beforeunload cleanup, then reopen app in the same browser session
steps.expected: Relay socket close evidence includes clean close frame 1000/1001
steps.observed: Persisted __debug.relayHistory after reopen recorded close event code=1001 with wasClean=true for ws://127.0.0.1:8194

steps.action: Reseed runtime from stored seed and compare pending state against pre-close request_ids; scan IndexedDB for stale request_ids
steps.expected: No stale pending_operations from closed session and no stale pending entries persisted in IndexedDB
steps.observed: pendingImmediately=[] and pendingAfter1_2s=[] with stalePresent=[]; indexedDbScan scanned keyval-store (recordsScanned=0, matches=[])

evidence.network: m1-ops/r4-g1-ops-tab-close/VAL-OPS-028-network-requests.txt (No requests captured; close-frame evidence sourced from DEV relayHistory hook)

frictions.description: agent-browser network requests output did not provide websocket frame-level close telemetry in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used DEV observability hook window.__debug.relayHistory (persisted across reopen) to capture close code/wasClean evidence.
